_publications._publicationTitle: Development of CAR-T cell therapy for NF1/SWN-related nerve sheath tumor treatment.

_contextSnippet: sNF96.2-luci was completely eliminated by all three types of CAR-T cells at an effector to target (E:T) ratio of 1: 1.
details: Completely eliminated by all three anti-HER1 CAR-T cells (806, E2, NEC) at E:T ratio of 1:1
